About Me

I'm an AI Automation Engineer based in Dubai with a passion for eliminating repetitive work through intelligent systems. I design and deploy workflow automation and AI-driven chatbot solutions that actually move the needle.

With hands-on experience in WhatsApp and Telegram automation, API integrations, and process optimization — I bridge the gap between business needs and technical execution.

Holding a BE in AI & Machine Learning, I bring both the theoretical foundations and practical mindset needed to build systems that scale.

Projects

PROJECT // 01
Tron Wallet Tracker Bot
Real-time TRC20 (USDT) transaction monitoring via TronScan API. Sends instant Telegram alerts for incoming/outgoing transactions, deduplicates entries, and logs everything to Google Sheets — fully automated.
n8n TronScan API Telegram Google Sheets
VIEW ON GITHUB
PROJECT // 02
WhatsApp AI Auto-Reply Bot
AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot that receives messages via webhook, processes them through Google Gemini, and sends intelligent contextual replies via Evolution API — with memory-based conversation context and custom knowledge base support.
n8n Google Gemini WhatsApp Evolution API
VIEW ON GITHUB
PROJECT // 03
AI Webchat Assistant
Domain-restricted AI assistant for websites that uses Tavily search to retrieve only verified, real-time data from your own domain — eliminating hallucinations and ensuring trustworthy responses for every user query.
n8n Gemini AI Tavily Search Webchat
VIEW ON GITHUB
PROJECT // 04
Messenger AI Lead Bot
Turns Facebook Messenger into an automated lead generation machine. The AI chatbot engages users naturally, collects and validates contact details, and stores everything directly into Google Sheets — no manual work required.
n8n OpenAI Facebook Messenger Google Sheets
VIEW ON GITHUB
PROJECT // 05
Universal PDF Reader & AI Extractor
Send any PDF to a Telegram bot and get back structured JSON. Supports bank statements, invoices, receipts, reports, and forms — AI extracts the relevant data and forwards it to any API endpoint automatically.
n8n Telegram Bot AI Extraction JSON / REST API
VIEW ON GITHUB
